inputs.label: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Air density at sea level; varies with altitude, temperature, and humidity. For aerodynamic lift, typical range 0.4–1.2 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Flow Velocity (v)
inputs.businessContext: Relative speed between air and the lifting surface (e.g., aircraft true airspeed, wind tunnel flow speed).

inputs.label: Reference Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: Planform area of the wing or lifting surface used for aerodynamic analysis (e.g., gross wing area).

inputs.label: Lift Coefficient (CL)
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless coefficient capturing the effect of angle of attack, airfoil shape, and flow conditions. Typical range 0.2–1.5 for aircraft.
